CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2008 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-11-2008 Off Calendar

Ntc And Motion Of Pltfs To Compel Compliance
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. Plaintiff Jean Oulette's motion to compel compliance with deposition, is taken off calendar, at the request of the moving party. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-04-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2008 Continued To Jan-09-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 303

Ntc Of Hearing On Mtn And Mtn Of Plntf'S To Compel Further Responses To Req.'S For Production Of Documents & For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Jean Quellette's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents is granted. As counsel for defendant asserted the defense of the advice of counsel during the deposition, the objections based on privilege have been waived. The remaining objections are overruled. Defendant is ordered to serve supplemental verified responses and produce documents within 10 days of notice of this order. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2007 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, For Production Of Documents & For Monetary Sanctions; Request To Take Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Oct-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Jean Quellette's motion to compel further responses to request for production of documents, is taken off calendar, at the request of the moving party. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2007 Set For Trial On Jan-22-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-09-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 622
